description: Test Phase 1 (CLARIFY): clarify → init → clarify Part 2. Focus on init creating real docs.

evals.name: new-empty-project
evals.prompt: toi muon lam mot web game mario don gian
evals.context: Empty directory, no files, no docs/, no code.
evals.expected_flow: clarify (detect empty) → init mode:new (ask user) → clarify Part 2 BUILD

assertions.text: clarify detects empty project → routes to init mode:new
PM reads actions/init.md before running init
init asks user via AskUserQuestion, not plain text
init runs create_docs_structure.py (not Write tool for project.md/state.md)
.claude/rules/ created: constitution.md + memory-structure.md

evals.name: existing-code-init-flow
evals.prompt: toi muon them tinh nang authentication vao project nay
evals.context: Project has: package.json, src/modules/{auth,user,video}, .git/, .eslintrc, prisma/, docker-compose.yml. NO docs/.
evals.expected_flow: clarify (quick scan) → init mode:existing (skeleton → general agent → feature agents) → clarify Part 2 BUILD

assertions.text: clarify quick scan: ls + git check + package.json only (3-4 tool calls)
PM reads actions/init.md before running init
init Step 0: runs create_docs_structure.py to create skeleton
init Step 1: spawns ONE general exploration agent
general agent writes DIRECTLY to docs/project.md, .claude/rules/, docs/foundations/
general agent outputs a feature list
init Step 2: spawns feature agents IN PARALLEL for each feature from list
feature agents write DIRECTLY to docs/features/{name}/requirements.md, user-stories.md, spec.md
init Step 3: PM reviews docs for gaps
init Step 4: presents summary to user via AskUserQuestion
PM does NOT read source code — only reads agent output / docs
state.md contains orchestrator tracking only (phase/action/feature), NOT project status

evals.name: existing-memory-feature-request
evals.prompt: toi muon them dark mode vao app
evals.context: Complete docs/ exists: project.md, state.md, .claude/rules/, features/. Project: React/TypeScript web app.

assertions.text: clarify reads project.md + state.md → goes to Part 2 (skips init)
asks about dark mode requirements via AskUserQuestion
does NOT re-ask project type or tech stack

evals.name: broken-memory
evals.prompt: toi muon lam mot web game mario
evals.context: docs/ exists with features/mario/spec.md but NO project.md.

assertions.text: clarify detects project.md missing → treats as broken memory
does NOT read or reuse orphaned spec.md
routes to init to rebuild memory

evals.name: analyze-existing-project
evals.prompt: phan tich project va chay no de toi xem no co j
evals.context: Existing monorepo: package.json, src/, prisma/, docker-compose.yml. NO docs/.
evals.expected_flow: clarify (quick scan) → init mode:existing (full docs creation) → clarify Part 2 EXPLORE-TASK

assertions.text: orchestrator activates — does NOT skip to reading code directly
init creates skeleton FIRST (create_docs_structure.py)
general agent updates docs/project.md with real info (not placeholder)
feature agents create docs/features/{name}/ for each major feature
.claude/rules/ has: constitution.md, memory-structure.md, conventions.md, git-workflow.md
clarify Part 2 asks EXPLORE-TASK scope via AskUserQuestion
PM does NOT read env files, source code, or docker configs directly

evals.name: partial-memory-state-missing
evals.context: docs/project.md exists with valid content. docs/state.md is MISSING.
evals.expected_flow: clarify (project.md exists, state.md missing → partial memory) → recreate state.md → Part 2

assertions.text: clarify reads project.md successfully
clarify detects state.md missing → recreates it (not full init)
does NOT treat as broken memory — project.md is valid
proceeds to Part 2 after recreating state.md
